title: Voting
description: Your stakes earn rewards by participating in governance. You can vote yourself or delegate voting to a Representative.

noFollowing.title: Your Stake isn't following yet
noFollowing.description: Choose trusted Representatives to vote automatically, or vote manually on proposals as they appear.
noFollowing.setupFollowingReminder: To earn voting rewards, your Stake must vote on proposals, either directly or by following trusted Representatives.

proposals.cta: Curious about what's being voted on?

warnings.stakeRequired: You need at least one Stake to follow a Representative. Please stake ICP first.

errors.loadFollowing: Unable to load following data. Please try refreshing the page.
